name: Pinnacle West Capital Corporation
description: Pinnacle West Capital Corporation is an American utility holding company headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona. Primarily known as the parent company of Arizona Public Service (APS), it provides retail and wholesale electric services to customers throughout the state of Arizona. The company engages in the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity using a diverse portfolio of energy sources, including nuclear, natural gas, oil, coal, and solar facilities. As a publicly traded entity on the New York Stock Exchange, it plays a critical role in supporting the energy infrastructure and economic growth of the region.
